reason: The printed cell 'Basic Adventures' (d20 roll 2) is a typo for 'Basic Adventurers' — the Notes section names the rows 'Basic Adventurers' and links the Adventuring Parties page. The spec names this exact typo as the overrides mechanism's example.
The printed cell 'Expert Adventurer' (d20 roll 6) is singular; the Notes section names the rows 'Expert Adventurers' — normalized so all NPC-party rows share one label.
